experiences.description: Plan and optimize Meta ad campaigns while coordinating cross-functional teams to deliver marketing and business projects on time.
highlights: Planned, executed, and optimized Meta advertising campaigns, managing campaign performance, budget allocation, and audience targeting to maximize ROI
Coordinated cross-functional teams including content, design, customer support, and operations to ensure timely execution of marketing and business projects
Monitored project timelines, tracked deliverables, and maintained project documentation to ensure smooth workflow and on-time completion
Analyzed campaign and operational data, prepared performance reports, and provided actionable insights to support management decision-making

experiences.description: Produced SEO-optimized social content and owned the content calendar to grow reach and engagement across Facebook and Instagram.
highlights: Produced 500+ engaging, targeted, and SEO-optimized posts for Facebook & Instagram, increasing engagement by 32%
Improved organic reach by 40-50% through keyword-based captions and an optimized posting schedule aligned with brand voice and target audience
Managed the full content calendar and ensured consistent branding across platforms
Collaborated with the marketing team to plan campaign-specific content
